text: A permit issued under Section 35780 for the movement of a park trailer, as described in Section 18009.3 of the Health and Safety Code, shall not be issued except to transporters, or licensed manufacturers and dealers.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 15. SIZE, WEIGHT, AND LOAD [35000 - 35796]
### Chapter 5. Weight [35550 - 35796]
#### Article 6. Permits and Agreements [35780 - 35796]
##### § 35780.3

A permit issued under Section 35780 for the movement of a park trailer, as described in Section 18009.3 of the Health and Safety Code, shall not be issued except to transporters, or licensed manufacturers and dealers.

*(Amended by Stats. 2000, Ch. 566, Sec. 8. Effective January 1, 2001.)*
